f2p_gates.description: cmd/entire/cli/agent/agent.go declares a top-level `HookResponseWriter` interface containing a `WriteHookResponse(message string) error` method (comments stripped before matching).
cmd/entire/cli/hooks.go no longer defines `func outputHookResponse(...)` or `type hookResponse struct` — both are deleted by the canonical refactor.

cmd/entire/cli/lifecycle.go uses a `.(agent.HookResponseWriter)` (or bare `.(HookResponseWriter)`) type-assertion to dispatch the welcome message AND no longer calls the old `outputHookResponse(` helper AND does call `WriteHookResponse(`.
claudecode/lifecycle.go defines a `WriteHookResponse` method receiver whose body JSON-encodes (json.NewEncoder/json.Marshal) a payload mentioning `systemMessage` — pins the Claude Code wire format.

factoryaidroid/lifecycle.go defines a `WriteHookResponse` method receiver whose body writes plain text via fmt.Fprint*/io.WriteString/os.Stdout.Write* AND does NOT JSON-encode — the headline behavior change (no more raw `{"systemMessage":...}` in the Factory terminal).

p2p_gates.description: `go build ./cmd/entire/...` succeeds (informational only per CLAUDE.md — never zeros reward).

notes: Replaces SWE-rebench stub (was scoring >=0.99 across all v0.4.3 trials due to 'overall pass rate' fallback with empty FAIL_TO_PASS). New gates target the Factory AI Droid welcome-message refactor on entireio/cli (canonical commit 8118d5e, parent 7f1cdc8c441effc233552e9780c51821939a00db). Validated locally: clone https://github.com/entireio/cli at parent commit, run test.sh against buggy baseline -> reward 0.000000; apply canonical patch (data-pipeline/artifacts_cli/canonical_patches/726de64d-e8b7-4952-a516-72c4774b2003.json, fidelity=exact, 6 files +57/-19) -> reward 1.000000. Partial-fix sanity: removing only the obsolete `outputHookResponse` helper (without adding the new interface or implementations) scores 0.20 - graceful partial credit. Anti-overfit: gates are interface-shape and call-site behavioral checks; comments are stripped before matching so docstring mentions of `outputHookResponse` won't accidentally pass/fail any gate. F2P_FACTORY_IMPL_PLAINTEXT is the headline behavioral check (the actual user-visible bug fix). P2P_GO_BUILD is informational only per scoring_traps.md (`p2p_failed = false` always).
